title: System update available
description:
T-Mobile is pleased to inform that there is a new, free software update ready for your Android smartphone.

This release includes various bug fixes, security and system improvements. It is strongly recommended that you install this Software Update to protect your device.

This will not consume your data.

Please charge your device at least 40% and do not turn off the device or unplug the charger while the update is installing. During installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1.
